description_long: This is a freestanding wooden shelving unit with a geometric, open-back design, featuring multiple rectangular compartments of varying sizes. The structure is composed of horizontal and vertical wooden panels, creating a visually interesting pattern with both large and small open spaces. The bottom section includes a solid base shelf, while the upper sections are divided into staggered cubby-like shelves. The wood appears to have a natural finish, giving the unit a warm, inviting look suitable for both indoor and sheltered outdoor urban environments. There are no visible doors, handles, or glass panels, emphasizing its open-access functionality. The overall build suggests it is sturdy enough to support books, decorative items, or small potted plants.
description: A freestanding wooden shelving unit with a geometric open-back design and multiple staggered compartments. The natural wood finish and open shelves make it ideal for displaying or storing items.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full arrangement of open rectangular shelves and the solid base shelf.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile and depth of the shelving unit, with shelves visible as horizontal lines.
description_view_2: Rear view, visually similar to the front, displaying the open-back structure and shelf layout.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the slim profile and the arrangement of shelves from the side.
